mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_id, c.nickname, c.email, c.content, c.status, c.create_time FROM t_comment c WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_id, c.nickname, c.email, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, r.nickname AS reply_to_nickname FROM t_comment c LEFT JOIN t_comment r ON c.reply_to_id = r.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_comment SET deleted = 1, status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_comment WHERE deleted = 0
AND article_id = #{articleId}
